title: Bitcoin's Quantum Risk Extends Beyond Wallet Security, Investor Warns
summary: Andrew Gault, a venture capitalist who funded quantum hardware labs, warns Bitcoin's biggest quantum risk isn't wallet keys but a broader threat. Google's own security team shifted focus in the same direction this March.
body: Andrew Gault, a venture capitalist who funded the quantum hardware labs now threatening bitcoin, argues the crypto industry is focusing on the wrong threat when it comes to quantum computing. While many fear quantum computers could break wallet encryption, Gault believes the real danger lies elsewhere. Google's own security team moved in the same direction in March.
twitterThread: Bitcoin's biggest quantum risk might not be wallet keys, says a VC who funded the quantum labs now threatening bitcoin. Google's security team agrees. What's the real threat?
Gault warns the crypto industry is looking in the wrong place. The real danger could be something broader than wallet encryption, as Google's team also shifted focus in March.

Stay informed about quantum computing developments. The timeline is uncertain, but this could impact Bitcoin security in unexpected ways. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-30-bitcoins-quantum-risk-extends-beyond-wallet-security-investor-warns
